privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a vendor 'Rhine Valley Components GmbH' (synthetic company) from Germany and a Purchase Order in EUR currency with two line items: 50 units of 'Precision Bearing Assembly Type-K' at 42.50 EUR/unit (totaling 2125.00 EUR) and 25 units of 'Industrial Servo Motor Controller' at 189.00 EUR/unit (totaling 4725.00 EUR), for a total Purchase Order amount of 6850.00 EUR. All metadata values are internally consistent with the task description, setup scripts, and verifier expectations.
